globalHeaders.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https://raw.githubusercontent.com; connect-src 'self' https://pokeapi.co https://beta.pokeapi.co;
globalHeaders.Permissions-Policy: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=(), payment=(), usb=(), interest-cohort=()
